articles.title: Kenya's president withdraws finance bill after weeks of protests
articles.excerpt: The government said it would not sign the disputed tax measures into law following sustained demonstrations.

articles.title: Nairobi sees largest protests yet over finance bill
articles.excerpt: Crowds gathered in the capital as opposition to proposed tax increases reached its peak.

articles.title: Kenya finance bill: what the proposed taxes would change
articles.excerpt: A breakdown of the levies that drew widespread public opposition.

articles.title: Young Kenyans lead online campaign against tax plans
articles.excerpt: A largely youth-driven movement organised demonstrations and shared information on social media.

articles.title: Kenya protesters march against cost of living measures
articles.excerpt: Demonstrators said the proposed taxes would deepen economic hardship.

articles.title: Business groups voice concern over Kenya finance bill
articles.excerpt: Trade associations warned that some measures could weigh on consumers and small firms.

articles.title: Kenya unveils finance bill with new tax proposals
articles.excerpt: The government presented tax measures it said were needed to reduce borrowing.
